articles.title: About Me
articles.description:
Hi, my name is Natalie Annett and I am a 3rd year Politics and 
International Relations student, with a specific interest in 
geopolitics. I enjoy reading in my spare time outside of my 
academic responsibilities and I particularly enjoy philosophical 
books that tend to be intertwined with politics.

            Bio
            As part of my degree requirement, I have been developing
            my quantitative analysis skills through R and I will be
            showing my progress in my final year project - a policy
            report - by producing a regression table. The activities I
            have done in previous assignments will demonstrate the
            development of my skills.
            
            
            Education
            University of Essex | Colchester, UK
            BSc Politics and International Relations | October 2022 -
            Present
